⬆ Urgent call for help: Support Yirgalem Adugnaw

We are reaching out to seek your assistance for Yirgalem Adugnaw, a 22 year-old male and the younger brother of Dr. Andinet Adugnaw. Yirgalem is currently battling acute liver failure of unknown secondary cause and is in stage 3 encephalopathy. He is admitted to Tikur Anbesa Specialized hospital. While the definitive treatment for his condition is a liver transplant, the immediate plan is to initiate plasmapheresis, which costs approximately 500,000 ETB. 

Let us come together to help this young patient and his family during this critical time.

CBE Account Number: 1000289224282 (Dr. Andinat Adugnaw)
(+251913761456: Dr Andinat Adugnaw Haregu)

⬆️ Free Training and Recruitment (Advertisement)

Rohobot Home-Based Health Care Service P.L.C is announcing urgent vacancies for health care professionals to work in partner hospitals and home-based healthcare services in Addis Ababa. The organization was established in January 2017 to provide quality home-based health care services for chronically ill and aged people using skilled health professionals at an affordable price. 

Organization: Rohobot Home-Based Health Care Service P.L.C

Location: Garment , Gerji , 22 

Professionals Needed:

1. Nurses (Comprehensive , Scrub Nurse, Neonatal ICU , Matron  )

Education: BSc Nursing / Clinical Nurse Level IV
(Minimum experience: Starting from 0 years)

Required No: 25

Additional Note: Female applicants only.


2. Bsc Midwife 

Education: BSc Midwife 
(Minimum experience: 2 year relevant experience)

Required No: 5


3.  Reception/ Accountant 

Education: Accounting and Finance
(Minimum experience: 6 months experience in healthcare)

Required No: 5

Additional Note: Female applicants only.


4. Junior IT 

Education: BSc Computer science , IT  
(Minimum experience: 1 years and above in healthcare is mandatory) 


Additional Notes:

- Female Applicants are Encouraged to apply

- All applicants must be willing to take a three-day free training before job opportunity is arranged.

- Rohobot Home Based Healthcare Services does not benefit financially from these job creations and does not request any payments for these services.

- If suitable candidates are found, the application link will be terminated. 


How to Apply:

For health care professional positions, apply through:
https://forms.gle/xPfA2icBiBV3Ccpd9

For non-healthcare professional positions, apply through:
https://docs.google.com/forms/d/1_5Yhih2kf0G8rDKtfDts_V1Y7FGcGT44C2ASRZ-LDb4/viewform?edit_requested=true

For support (Telegram/WhatsApp):
+251999853406 / +251947959697

Advertisement 

📢📢📣Patients are searching for you. Make sure they can find you." 📣

🩺 Dear Doctors,

People may forget the hospital they visited 🏥.

They may forget the ward where they received treatment 🛏️.

But they never forget the doctor who changed their life 🌟.

Every day, patients across Ethiopia are searching for trusted doctors 👨‍⚕️. Many are looking for you—but they don't know where to find you 🔍.

With Tena Yistilign Doctor App, you can:

✅ Create your professional digital profile 📝

✅ Set your availability and consultation schedule 🗓

✅ Accept and manage appointments easily 📋

✅ Offer in-person, audio, or video consultations and earn additional income—all on your own schedule.📹

✅ Increase your professional visibility 📈

✅ Reach more patients across Ethiopia 🇪🇹

Your years of education, dedication, and service deserve to be visible ✨.

Join Ethiopia's growing digital healthcare network today 🤝.

📲 Download the Tena Yistilign Doctor App and register now:
https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.mandltrading.doctorapp

Because patients are already looking for you 👀.

Let them find you 🗺️.

#TenaYistilign #TenaYistilignDoctor #DoctorsOfEthiopia #EthiopianDoctors #DigitalHealth #Telemedicine #HealthcareInnovation #MedicalProfessionals #HealthcareTechnology
